news.title:
FIIs bought small-cap stocks despite selling ₹1.12T Indian equities in March 2026, focusing on Shringar House of Mangalsutra, Granules India, Repco Home Finance, and Sharda Cropchem.
Highlights include Shringar's 30% growth guidance, Granules' product launches, Repco's IT revamp, and Sharda's strong global agrochemical presence.
news.summary:
FIIs bought small-cap stocks despite selling ₹1.12T Indian equities in March 2026, focusing on Shringar House of Mangalsutra, Granules India, Repco Home Finance, and Sharda Cropchem.
Highlights include Shringar's 30% growth guidance, Granules' product launches, Repco's IT revamp, and Sharda's strong global agrochemical presence.

news.title:
Granules India to enhance oversight, digitize records post US FDA warning.
Issues include record-keeping, contamination at its largest plant; US key revenue market.
news.summary:
Granules India to enhance oversight, digitize records post US FDA warning.
Issues include record-keeping, contamination at its largest plant; US key revenue market.

news.title:
Granules India completed US FDA cGMP audit at Chantilly site.
Four Form 483 observations noted; no data integrity issues reported.
news.summary:
Granules India completed US FDA cGMP audit at Chantilly site.

news.title:

news.title:
Granules India's unit got VAI status after USFDA inspection of its Telangana facility.

Post-inspection closure, FDA took no further regulatory action.

Inspection covered cGMP, pre-approval; no regulatory action recommended, enhancing production.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Laurus Labs, BHEL, Granules India, SBI, and Sun Pharma for strong upside, citing technical and fundamental strengths.
Laurus Labs, BHEL, and Sun Pharma show bullish setups; SBI benefits from credit growth, while Granules India leverages cost-efficient production.

news.title:
Granules India, Aurobindo Pharma, and Wheels India emerge as top picks with bullish setups.
Analyst recommends buying Granules at ₹629, Wheels at ₹1,090, and Aurobindo at ₹1,308 with specific targets.

news.title:
Granules India's Virginia facility cleared USFDA inspection with zero observations, marking its second successful audit.
Q3 results showed net profit up 27.7% to ₹150.2cr; revenue rose 22% to ₹1,387.9cr, lifting margins to 22.2%.
news.summary:
Granules India's Virginia facility cleared USFDA inspection with zero observations, marking its second successful audit.
Q3 results showed net profit up 27.7% to ₹150.2cr; revenue rose 22% to ₹1,387.9cr, lifting margins to 22.2%.

news.title:
Granules India's US subsidiary received a favorable FDA report with no action needed.
The facility is vital for OTC product packaging and distribution.
news.summary:
Granules India's US subsidiary received a favorable FDA report with no action needed.
The facility is vital for OTC product packaging and distribution.

news.title:
Granules India reported Q3 revenue of INR 13.9bn, up 22% YoY, driven by strong sales in North America and Europe.
The stock has risen 15.6% in 12 months with analysts maintaining a Buy stance and a target price of INR 645.7.
news.summary:
Granules India reported Q3 revenue of INR 13.9bn, up 22% YoY, driven by strong sales in North America and Europe.
The stock has risen 15.6% in 12 months with analysts maintaining a Buy stance and a target price of INR 645.7.

news.title:
Granules India allotted 2.5 crore convertible warrants to promoters and non-promoters.
51.28 lakh equity shares were allotted to non-promoter investors, increasing paid-up capital.
news.summary:
Granules India allotted 2.5 crore convertible warrants to promoters and non-promoters.
51.28 lakh equity shares were allotted to non-promoter investors, increasing paid-up capital.

news.summary:

news.title:
Granules India expects FY27 growth to hinge on US FDA remediation, with 10-13 pending product launches post-clearance.
Q3 FY26 profit rose 27.7% YoY to ₹150.2 crore; shares up 6% YoY, market cap at ₹14,026.3 crore.
news.summary:
Granules India expects FY27 growth to hinge on US FDA remediation, with 10-13 pending product launches post-clearance.
Q3 FY26 profit rose 27.7% YoY to ₹150.2 crore; shares up 6% YoY, market cap at ₹14,026.3 crore.

Granules India reports strong Q3 performance and expects Peptides CDMO to breakeven in Q4FY26.

news.title:
Granules India uploaded Q3 FY26 earnings call audio on its website.
The recording is per SEBI LODR regulations and accessible for investors.
news.summary:

news.title:
Granules India Q3 FY26 net profit rose 27.7% to ₹150.2 crore; revenue grew 22% to ₹1,387.9 crore.
EBITDA increased 33.4% to ₹308.4 crore, with margins improving to 22.2%; shares fell 1.2% to ₹564.40 on NSE.
news.summary:
Granules India Q3 FY26 net profit rose 27.7% to ₹150.2 crore; revenue grew 22% to ₹1,387.9 crore.
EBITDA increased 33.4% to ₹308.4 crore, with margins improving to 22.2%; shares fell 1.2% to ₹564.40 on NSE.

news.title:
Granules India Ltd's EGM on Jan 22, 2026, approved issuing 2.5 crore warrants and 51.28 lakh equity shares on a preferential basis.
All resolutions passed with requisite majority; voting results and details available on the company's website.
news.summary:
Granules India Ltd's EGM on Jan 22, 2026, approved issuing 2.5 crore warrants and 51.28 lakh equity shares on a preferential basis.
All resolutions passed with requisite majority; voting results and details available on the company's website.
